assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies the setup with 2 dev clusters on Rapid channel and 2 prod clusters on Stable channel, and structures the checklists accordingly with specific references to both environments

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: The response specifically mentions mandatory resource requests, notes that node pool upgrades are handled automatically by GKE, and includes Autopilot-specific sections explaining what GKE handles vs. user control points

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl commands for checking deprecated API usage: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' in both pre and post-upgrade sections

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'All containers have resource requests (mandatory - pods rejected without them)' and provides a specific kubectl command to verify resource requests

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDB configuration checks, bare pods verification with kubectl command, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds requirements

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific gcloud and kubectl commands to verify control plane version and node versions: 'gcloud container clusters describe' and 'kubectl get nodes -o wide'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks: deployments, failed pods, StatefulSets, jobs, ingress/load balancers, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends using dev clusters for validation since they likely already upgraded to 1.32, and includes a dedicated 'Dev Cluster Validation' section in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: The response mentions that the upgrade is coming 'next month' but does not specifically discuss the GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeframe beyond the standard notifications
Includes comprehensive monitoring items in both pre and post-upgrade checklists: baseline metrics, Cloud Monitoring dashboards, metrics collection, log aggregation, error rates, and API latency

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response only shows maintenance exclusions for general upgrade deferral ('no_upgrades' scope), not node-specific exclusions, and focuses on control plane timing controls which are appropriate for Autopilot
